data.title: U.S. Ends Trade Talks with Canada Over Digital Tax Dispute
data.description: According to Odaily, U.S. President Donald Trump announced on social media on June 27 that the United States has learned of Canada's decision to impose a digital services tax on American technology companies. Trump described this move as a "direct and blatant attack" on the United States, suggesting that Canada is following the European Union's example. In response to this unexpected tax, Trump declared the immediate termination of all trade negotiations with Canada. The United States will inform Canada of the tariffs applicable to trade with the U.S. within the next seven days.

data.title: Robinhood Launches XRP and Solana Micro Futures
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US digital brokerage Robinhood (NASDAQ: HOOD) announced the addition of XRP and Solana micro futures products, and launched a micro version of the existing Bitcoin Friday futures, further enriching its crypto product line. Micro futures contracts have a lower capital threshold than standard futures. Earlier this year, Robinhood launched cash-settled crypto futures including Bitcoin, Micro Bitcoin, Bitcoin Friday and Ethereum. In addition, this month Robinhood just completed the $200 million acquisition of the crypto exchange Bitstamp, and intends to acquire WonderFi, supported by Kevin O'Leary, to accelerate its global layout.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Benson: Reciprocal tariffs may be re-imposed on 20 countries
data.description: U.S. Treasury Secretary Bessant: Reciprocal tariffs may be re-imposed on 20 countries, or if we believe that the other party is negotiating in good faith, tariffs on these countries may remain at 10%.

data.title: Gemini and Dinari Partner to Launch Tradable Tokenized US Stocks for EU Users, Launching MSTR First
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Cryptocurrency trading platform Gemini announced a partnership with tokenized U.S. stock provider Dinari, allowing EU customers to now purchase tokenized U.S. stock "Strategy (MSTR)" shares on the platform and realize free transfer on the chain, ensuring that token holders enjoy the same economic rights as real stocks. In the future, more tokenized U.S. stocks and ETF products will be launched on Gemini one after another.

data.title: Trump: US will immediately terminate all trade negotiations with Canada
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to CCTV News, on June 27 local time, US President Trump posted on the social media platform that the United States had just learned that Canada announced that it would impose a digital service tax on US technology companies. Trump called it a "direct and naked attack" on the United States, saying that Canada was clearly following the example of the European Union. Trump said that in view of this shocking tax, the United States hereby terminated all trade negotiations with Canada, effective immediately. The United States will inform Canada of the tariffs it will pay for trade with the United States within the next seven days.

data.title: $1,000,000,000,000 of Extremely Scarce Asset Is Hiding on the Moon, Ready To Be Exploited – And It’s Not Gold: Report
data.description:
Over $1 trillion of a precious and highly desirable metal is ready and waiting to be mined on the moon – and it’s not gold, according to researchers. A massive pile of platinum has accumulated under the moon’s surface, according to a paper published in the journal Planetary and Space Science.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/06/27/1000000000000-of-extremely-scarce-asset-is-hiding-on-the-moon-ready-to-be-exploited-and-its-not-gold-report/

data.title: Mexican Man Sentenced to Over Eight Years in Prison for Using Crypto To Launder $5,500,000 in Illicit Drug Money
data.description:
A Mexican national has been sentenced to eight years and four months in prison as a major player in a drug money laundering conspiracy that used crypto. According to a new U. S. Department of Justice (DOJ) press release, Jose “Meno” Martinez of Guadalajara, Mexico, helped drug traffickers launder money in Mexico
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/06/27/mexican-man-sentenced-to-over-eight-years-in-prison-for-using-crypto-to-launder-5500000-in-illicit-drug-money/

data.title: SOL Strategies Deploys $100K+ Jito Tokens in Solana Strategic Ecosystem Reserve—What’s Next?
data.description:
SOL Strategies has announced the launch of a new initiative to support critical infrastructure within the Solana ecosystem. The Canada-based public company revealed on June 26 that it has established a Strategic Ecosystem Reserve (SER), starting with a purchase of over 52,000 Jito (JTO) tokens, valued at more than $100,000.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/sol-strategies-deploys-100k-jito-tokens-in-solana-strategic-ecosystem-reserve-whats-next/

data.title: Top 5 Crypto Stocks To Watch For Long Term Growth
data.description:
Crypto stocks have become a significant point of interest for investors seeking opportunities beyond short-term market fluctuations. Notably, as the United States economy shows resilience, inflation pressure softens. The crypto sector is gradually recovering from the setbacks of previous years. Currently, institutional interest is rising, and companies are expanding their digital asset portfolios
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/27/top-5-crypto-stocks-to-watch-for-long-term-growth/
